content: Hey, I'm trying to get my finances in order. I've been working at this DeFi protocol in Portland, OR for about 5 years now, and I feel like I should be saving more.
That's great that you're taking the initiative to sort out your finances! What kind of expenses do you have on a monthly basis?
Well, I have to take care of my aging parents, so that's a big expense. I also just bought a new pair of running shoes for my marathon training - I'm trying to run 3 times a week.
That's very kind of you to take care of your parents. How much do you typically spend on their care per month?
It's around $2,000 per month. And I've also been spending a bit on home automation, trying to make my place more efficient. I just installed a new smart thermostat last weekend.
Home automation can be a great investment. Have you considered setting up a separate budget for your hobbies, like marathon running and leatherworking?
Yeah, that's a good idea. I've been trying to allocate 10% of my income towards hobbies and entertainment. I'm also trying to save up for a DJing course, which costs around $1,500.
That sounds like a fun course! Are you planning on taking it this year, or is it more of a long-term goal?
I'm hoping to take it by the end of the year, so I can start DJing at some local events in Portland. I've heard the music scene here is really great.
That's exciting! Portland does have a great music scene. What's your current income like, and how much do you think you can realistically save per month?
I make around $120,000 per year, and I think I can save around $5,000 per month. But I want to make sure I'm allocating it wisely, so I can reach my financial goals.

That's a great income, and it's even more impressive that you're trying to save so much. Let's work on creating a budget that works for you, and see if we can't find some ways to optimize your expenses.
Sounds good to me. I'd love to get some advice on how to manage my finances, especially with the rising costs of living in Portland.
We can definitely work on that. Have you considered investing in any other assets, like real estate or stocks?
I've been thinking about it, but I'm not sure where to start. I've heard that investing in a diversified portfolio is a good idea, but I don't know much about it.
Investing can be intimidating at first, but it's a great way to grow your wealth over time. I can provide you with some general information on investing, and we can discuss your options.
That would be great, thanks. I feel like I'm just starting to get my finances in order, and I want to make sure I'm making the most of my money.
You're welcome! It's always a good idea to review and adjust your budget regularly. Let's schedule a follow-up conversation for next month to check in on your progress.
Sounds good to me. I'm looking forward to it. And maybe by then, I'll have started my DJing course and can give you an update on that too!
I'd love to hear about it. It was great chatting with you, River. Take care, and I'll talk to you soon!
You too, thanks for the help! I'm feeling more confident about my finances already.
You're welcome, River. Remember to stay on top of your budget, and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any more questions or concerns.
Will do, thanks again!
You're welcome, have a great day!
You too!
Take care, and good luck with your marathon training and DJing course!
